title: Wedding Invitation
fonts: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"
text: The best things in life are meant to be shared. Please join us for our wedding celebration
Join us as we exchange vows and begin our forever.
A celebration with dinner, drinks, and heartfelt toasts.
Dance the night away with live music and open bar.
A chance encounter at a mutual friend's garden party changed everything.
A candlelit dinner at a little Italian place downtown — we talked until they closed.
We found our cozy apartment and started building a home filled with love.
Under a sky full of stars, Jonathan got down on one knee and asked the question.
And now, we invite you to celebrate the next chapter of our love story.
We kindly request formal attire. Gentlemen are encouraged to wear dark suits or tuxedos. Ladies, floor-length gowns or elegant cocktail dresses are perfect.
